units.title: My Body - Part 2
units.subtitle: Arms, Legs, Hands, Feet and Actions

lessons.title: Move Your Body
lessons.topic: Main limbs and the grammar of commands

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: Which body part do you clap with in the song?
questions.hint: You have two of them and use them to hold things.

questions.question_text: Where do you wear your shoes?
questions.hint: You use them to walk and run.

questions.question_text: What do you nod with when you say yes?
questions.hint: It's at the top of your body.

items.definition: At the end of your arm

steps.title: Ella's Fun Day
steps.text: Hi! I am Ella. I have two strong legs. I can stomp my feet. Clap your hands with me. Let's play!

questions.question: How many legs does Ella have?

steps.explanation: Use 'Clap your' to ask for clapping.

steps.audio_text: Hello, friends! Let's have fun today. Touch your legs and jump up high. Can you do it?

questions.question: What should you do after touching your legs?

steps.prompt: Action: Can you say 'Touch your arm'?

questions.question_text: Fill in the blank: Touch your ___. (Grammar question)
What part of the body helps you wave hello? (Vocabulary question)
True or False: We use our legs to jump.
Choose the command that matches: 'Touch your...'
Which sentence is a command?

lessons.title: Ten Fingers
lessons.topic: Small body parts and plural review

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: What do you use to clap your hands?
questions.hint: You have five fingers on each.

questions.question_text: What part helps you see the world around you?
questions.hint: They are usually above your nose and below your forehead.

questions.question_text: What do you use to taste yummy food?
questions.hint: It's inside your mouth and helps you taste.

items.example: Touch your finger to your nose.
I have a long jump rope.

items.definition: Not big from end to end

steps.title: Wiggle and Clap!
steps.text: Wiggle your fingers! I have ten fingers. Clap your hands! I have ten toes. My toes are short. Touch your toes and smile.

questions.question: How many fingers do they have?
What should you do after touching your toes?

steps.explanation: We say "are" for more than one.

steps.audio_text: Look at your hands and feet. You have ten fingers and ten small toes. Can you touch your nose with a finger?

questions.question: How many toes do you have?
What should you touch with your finger?

questions.question_text: What do you have ten of on your feet? (Vocabulary question)
Fingers are ___. (Grammar question)
Which sentence is correct? (Reading comprehension)
True or False: Toes are on your head.

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: What do you bend when you wave hello?
questions.hint: It's in the middle of your arm!

questions.question_text: What part of your body helps you kick a ball?
questions.hint: Think of what you wear shoes on.

questions.question_text: Which helps you turn your head to see left and right?

steps.title: Dance with Me!
steps.text: Clap your hands and say, 'I have two hands!' Stomp your feet and shout, 'I have two feet!' Touch your knees and shoulders. Great job, everyone!

questions.question: What do you do with your feet?
How many hands do you have?

steps.audio_text: Let's have some fun! First, stand up and touch your shoulders. Now, stomp your feet and say, 'I have knees!'

questions.question: What do you have after stomping?

questions.question_text: Touch your ___. (Grammar question)
Which action is 'clap'? (Vocabulary question)
True or False: You stomp with your ears.
What do you say after stomping? (Reading comprehension)

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: What body part helps you hear music?
questions.hint: Think about what you use when listening to your favorite song.

questions.question_text: Which body part do you use to clap your hands?
questions.hint: These are on your arms and have fingers.

questions.question_text: What do you use to taste yummy food?
questions.hint: It's the part of your face where you eat and talk.

steps.title: Super Day with My Body
steps.text: I have two eyes and a nose. I can see the sky. Touch your nose! I have ten toes. I can stomp my feet. My hands can clap. Touch your shoulders!

questions.question: How many toes does the character have?
What can the character do with hands?

steps.audio_text: I have two blue eyes and a big red hat. Watch me clap my hands and stomp my feet!

questions.question: Does he have a red hat?

steps.prompt: Say: 'I have two feet and two legs.'
steps.expected_text: i have two feet and two legs

questions.question_text: Touch your ___ when you hear a sound. (Vocabulary question)
True or False: We say 'I have two foots.'
Can you clap your ___? (Grammar question)
I ___ a big red ball. (Reading comprehension question)
